purpose: Candidate calibrated structural-wave direction model for read-only portfolio decision support.

promotion_gates.required_evidence: Matured BUY and SELL forecast episodes must show displayed confidence within 10 percentage points of realized directional success across fixed calibration buckets.
BUY and SELL precision lower confidence bounds must be acceptable on matured forecasts across at least five symbols.
Largest false BUY and SELL episodes must not reveal a repeatable data-quality, concentration, or regime failure.
Time-decayed evidence may inform a future version only if it improves sealed calibration without increasing single-symbol concentration.

failure_gates: Any Robinhood write action or order preview invalidates the candidate.
Any use of stale or poor price data for BUY or SELL invalidates the candidate.
Any promotion based on raw in-sample rates without matured forecast outcomes invalidates the candidate.
